overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character in period clothing exploring the interior of Sainte-Chapelle Gothic cathedral. The character walks down a central red carpet aisle surrounded by towering stained glass windows and ornate stone architecture, with warm golden sunlight streaming through the windows creating colorful patterns on the marble floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic cathedral nave with central red carpet aisle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central red carpet aisle toward the altar, flanked by tall stained glass windows

entered.detail: long red carpet runner extending down the central nave toward the altar
towering Gothic stained glass windows with colorful panes reaching to the vaulted ceiling
stone statues mounted on columns between the windows
ornate altar at the far end of the nave with Gothic archways

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the central aisle of a grand Gothic cathedral, following a red carpet toward the distant altar. Tall stained glass windows line both sides, casting colorful light patterns across the marble floor. Stone statues stand on columns between the windows, and the space is empty of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral altar area with elevated upper chapel

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the upper chapel balcony and vaulted ceiling structure

agents.ego_description: stops at the altar area and looks up at the upper architecture and stained glass windows above

entered.detail: elevated stone balcony with intricate Gothic carvings above the main altar
high vaulted ceiling with ribbed Gothic architecture
carved stone railing separating the altar area from the nave

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the altar area where the camera tilts upward to showcase the magnificent upper chapel structure. The ornate stone balcony and vaulted ceiling dominate the view, with detailed Gothic carvings visible on the railing and archways.

scene_state.functional_zone: side corridor with golden gates and candelabras

events.description: character turns right and enters a narrower side corridor with different lighting

agents.ego_description: turns right and walks through side arches into a narrower corridor area, passing ornate golden gates

entered.detail: elaborate golden metal gate with intricate filigree patterns separating the corridor from side chapels
series of Gothic archways forming the side aisle of the cathedral
tall candelabras with multiple white candles lining the corridor
simple wooden chairs arranged along the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the main nave into a narrower side corridor, passing through Gothic archways. The space features ornate golden gates on the right, tall candelabras with white candles, and wooden chairs along the walls. The lighting becomes slightly dimmer and more intimate compared to the main aisle.

scene_state.functional_zone: side aisle with tall stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: walks along the side aisle admiring the tall stained glass windows and architectural details

entered.detail: wall-mounted candelabras with lit candles between the windows

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the side aisle where the tall stained glass windows now dominate the right side of the frame. Wall-mounted candelabras and wooden chairs line the corridor, while sunlight continues to stream through the colorful glass, illuminating the stone statues mounted between the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral rear with rose window and exit

events.description: bright sunlight beams become visible streaming through the rose window creating dramatic light rays

agents.ego_description: approaches the rear of the cathedral and looks up at the large rose window and upper balcony area

entered.detail: large circular stained glass rose window with intricate geometric patterns at the cathedral rear
wooden balcony with carved railings above the exit doorway
large doorway with bright exterior light streaming through

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the rear of the cathedral where a magnificent rose window dominates the wall above the exit doorway. Bright sunlight streams through the doorway and rose window, creating dramatic golden light beams that illuminate the dust particles in the air. The upper wooden balcony with intricate carvings is visible above the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand Gothic cathedral, transitioning from the expansive main nave into intimate side corridors before ending at a luminous rear exit. It begins with the character walking down a central red carpet aisle, where towering stained glass windows cast colorful patterns across the marble floor. As the character reaches the altar, the camera tilts upward to reveal the ornate vaulted ceilings and carved stone balconies of the upper chapel before shifting focus toward a narrower side corridor. The scene then moves through Gothic archways into a dimmer space lined with golden gates, white candelabras, and wooden chairs, while the colorful light of the windows continues to illuminate stone statues along the path. Finally, the camera advances to the rear of the cathedral, where dramatic golden beams of sunlight stream through a magnificent rose window and the exit doorway, illuminating dust particles in the air beneath an intricate wooden balcony.
